subject: Re:
body:
let marcus do the guest rooms ,, it should have the same palette and ambience/ tell them about discount , but only after EVERYHTING is in the house


----- Original Message ----
From: Gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Sent: Sunday, December 23, 2007 2:08:55 PM
Subject: 


Are you happy letting sarah and I do the guest rooms together? If so I can order tom + how do you want me to handle the discount issue?
Marcus went to the house yest to measure for the curtains..he sd he can do blinds everywhere except in guest rooms - he is suggesting the same colour blinds as the floor..how do you feel about that? He is going to fed ex samples to LSJ if that's ok (let me know) or 457 of the blinds and curtain fabric he proposes along with design of curtains by next Fri + prices. I am also having him e mail same so a decision can be made faster. I asked him also to come up w/some other items to help complete the house which he will also send (lamps odd tables rugs) I am still at the ranch till about 2 when I go to SD  - tried to call but it went to vm
Went over some items here at ranch which I'll tell you about when we speak




Thx

G
